parameters.jsonBody:
={  
    "branchId": {{ $json.query.branchId }},
    "contactId": {{ $json.query.contactId }},
    "listingId": {{ $json.query.listingId }},
    "status": "{{ $json.query.status }}",
    "source": "{{ $json.query.source }}",
    "howDidYouHear": {{ $json.query.howDidYouHear }},
    "requestViewing": {{ $json.query.requestViewing }},
    "requestValuation": {{ $json.query.requestViewing }},
    "requestListingDetails": {{ $json.query.requestListingDetails }},
    "notes": "--- AI QUALIFICATION REPORT ---\n   Property: \n   Occupants: {{ $json.query.adults }} Adults, {{ $json.query.children }} Children\n   Employment: {{ $json.query.employment_status }} ({{ $json.query.occupations }})\n   Income Check: \n {{ $json.query.income_confirmed_30x }}  Council Assistance: {{ $json.query.council_assistance }}\n   Adverse Credit: {{ $json.query.adverse_credit }}\n   Pets: {{ $json.query.pets_details }}\n   Move Date: {{ $json.query.ideal_move_date }}\n   Preference: {{ $json.query.furnished_unfurnished }}\n   ----------------------------------\n   Call Summary: {{ $json.query.call_summary }}"
}

={  "branchId": {{ $json.query.branchId }},  "contactId": {{ $json.query.contactId }},  "notifyBranch": true,  "title": "📞 New Message from {{ $json.query.caller_name }}",  "body": "Anna has taken a message: {{ $json.query.call_summary }}",  "icon": "phone"}

parameters.jsCode:
const data = JSON.parse($input.first().json.data);

return [{
  json: {
    leadId: data.id,
    status: data.status,
    source: data.source,
    contactId: data.contactId,
    listingId: data.listingId,
    branchId: data.branchId,
    requestViewing: data.requestViewing,
    requestValuation: data.requestValuation,
    requestListingDetails: data.requestListingDetails,
    howDidYouHear: data.howDidYouHear,
    createdAt: data.dtsCreated,
    moveDate: data.notes.match(/Move Date:\s*(.+)/i)?.[1]?.trim(),
    preference: data.notes.match(/Preference:\s*(.+)/i)?.[1]?.trim(),
    occupants: data.notes.match(/Occupants:\s*(.+)/i)?.[1]?.trim(),
    employment: data.notes.match(/Employment:\s*(.+)/i)?.[1]?.trim(),
    adverseCredit: !/adverse credit.*none/i.test(data.notes),
    pets: !/pets.*none/i.test(data.notes),
    councilAssistance: !/council assistance.*no/i.test(data.notes),
    callSummary: data.notes.match(/Call Summary:\s*(.+)/i)?.[1]?.trim(),
  }
}];

query.call_summary: Caller is interested in a 2-bedroom cottage in Lagos. Ideal move-in date is April. No pets, no adverse credit history, and prefers unfurnished property.
